title: rubia hangii
intro: Rubia hangii, also known as Himalayan madder, is a species of flowering plant in the madder family that is native to the Himalayan region. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The plant has been traditionally used to treat various health issues, such as fever, digestive problems, and skin conditions, providing benefits such as reduced inflammation, improved digestive health, and improved skin tone. Rubia hangii is often prepared as a herbal tea, capsule, or powder, and can also be used topically in the form of creams and ointments.
